en: Hello everyone, so here are 16 debating topics
Offline classes versus online classes, government job versus private job, knowledge versus degree
Village life versus city life, print media versus electric media, money versus time
Outer beauty versus inner beauty, love marriage versus arranged marriage, talent versus beauty
brain versus beauty, school life versus college life
Start participating in the debates if you want to enhance your English speaking and if you want a group for practicing
I have given a link in the description box. Please check it out and get joined there on the telegram. Thank you
